title: Persistent Enchantment
description:
Replaces Mending with Persistent, a more balanced enchantment that mimics Elytra breaking behaviour for other items.
Part of the Murf Tweaks package mod.
body:
**Persistent is a replacement for Mending which removes XP repairing but prevents items from breaking at low durability by making the unusable, mimicing Elytra behaviour.**

The enchantment is available either as an override for Mending or it's own unique enchantment. Two built-in datapacks are provided to change this functionality per-world. I also recommend a mod which removes anvil cost scaling, so you can continue to repair your gear indefinitely

The mod is designed to work entirely server-side. The implementation is slightly smoother if the client also has the mod installed, however functionally there is no difference.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T61T1SK5)

![Murf Tweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa317020f29ec30acd5a1b23b42b37f5843873f.png)

**This is one part of the [Murf Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/murf-tweaks) package mod!**
